headline_en: Mythos AI Breaches NSA Systems; Workflow and Coding Tools Advance
lede_en: Today's AI landscape reveals a stark duality: a newly disclosed system, Mythos, shattered long‑held security assumptions by automatically compromising NSA‑classified systems in hours, while Anthropic shared practical guides on turning Claude into a digital coworker and a salesperson used Claude Code to overhaul his team’s workflows. Meituan’s Tabbit app further disrupted the market by offering free unified access to top models, and the Qwen Code and Kimi CLI tools shipped reliability and safety improvements for agentic coding.

sections_en.title: Workplace AI: From Coworker to Team‑Wide Overhaul
sections_en.body: Anthropic’s new Claude Cowork product guide lays out best practices for integrating AI as a collaborative partner, moving it from a command‑line tool to a true digital team member. An internal salesperson’s story of rebuilding his team’s workflows with Claude Code provides concrete proof of dogfooding: non‑engineers automated repetitive tasks and streamlined operations, showing that generative AI can boost productivity far beyond traditional coding use cases. Together, these signal that AI is becoming an embedded layer in everyday business functions, not just a specialist tool.

sections_en.title: Shattered Assumptions: The Mythos Wake‑Up Call
sections_en.body: Mythos demonstrated the ability to automatically compromise nearly all NSA classified systems within hours and previously broke macOS in five days—tasks that take elite human teams months and cost millions of dollars per exploit. This instantly scales what were once nation‑state‑level attack capabilities to thousands of adversaries, forcing a fundamental rethink of security models. For AI researchers, it is a stark reminder that automated vulnerability discovery and exploitation can now threaten high‑value targets across critical infrastructure without warning.

sections_en.title: The AI Access Land Grab
sections_en.body: Meituan’s Tabbit international app tackles model fragmentation by offering free, subscription‑less access to flagship systems like GPT‑5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8. This promotional strategy positions Tabbit as the AI interaction gateway, conditioning users to a single free platform and potentially pressuring model providers’ direct monetization by removing paywalls. It marks an aggressive move in the race to control the distribution layer of AI services.

sections_en.title: Agent Engineering: Smoother CLIs, Safer Loops
sections_en.body: Qwen Code’s v0.18.5 stable release fixed opt‑in prompts for plan mode and improved ignore‑pattern handling, while a nightly build restored full context visibility and automated VSCode companion publishing. Kimi CLI v1.48.0 went a step further for agentic safety, introducing a dead‑end streak detector that force‑stops execution when an AI agent repeatedly calls the same tool without progress, preventing infinite loops and broken state. These refinements show how CLI‑based coding agents are rapidly maturing, combining developer convenience with the guardrails needed for autonomous operation.

headline_zh: Mythos数小时攻破NSA机密系统，AI安全威胁颠覆现有防御假设
lede_zh: 今日AI领域呈现鲜明的双刃剑图景：Anthropic发布Claude Cowork推动团队协作，美团tabbit聚合旗舰模型降低使用门槛，而NSA局长披露的Mythos攻击事件却暴露出AI能力扩散带来的灾难性安全挑战。与此同时，Qwen Code和Moonshot的迭代更新则在工程层面强化着AI代理的可靠性与可控性。

sections_zh.title: AI协作重塑工作流：从团队指南到跨职能自动化
sections_zh.body: Anthropic推出的Claude Cowork产品指南，系统阐述了如何将对话式AI嵌入团队协作，以简化流程、共享信息并自动处理常规任务。紧接着，其内部销售人员便展示了一个更具颠覆性的用例：利用Claude Code直接重构销售流程，自动化重复环节，将AI编程助手延伸至非技术团队的运营优化。此外，美团tabbit国际版免费集成GPT-5.5与Claude Opus 4.8等旗舰模型，让用户无需分别订阅多项服务即可调用顶尖能力。三者共同指向一个趋势：AI正从开发者专属工具变为跨职能、平台化的生产力引擎。

sections_zh.title: 安全边界破裂：Mythos数小时攻破NSA，高级攻击能力扩散
sections_zh.body: NSA局长公开表示，AI系统Mythos在数小时内突破该机构几乎所有的机密系统，而此前Google Project Zero等顶级团队需耗时数月才能完成类似工作。这一能力的跃升意味着原本仅由少数精英掌握的高级攻击技术，已扩散至数以千计的潜在攻击者，直接威胁到大量依赖苹果设备的高价值用户群体，并打破了macOS长久以来的安全假设。事件表明，AI安全已从理论风险演变为迫在眉睫的实战考验，对防御体系与AI行为对齐提出了紧迫要求。

sections_zh.title: Agent 工程迭代：强化代码助手与智能体的可控性
sections_zh.body: 在AI代理的工程层面，Qwen Code v0.18.5版修复了多项关键问题：强制计划模式提示需用户主动选择加入，增加了对以点号开头的忽略文件的识别，并强化了shell工作目录的约束，从而避免意外行为。同时，Moonshot某版本解决了空推理内容的往返一致性问题，并增强了工具调用死循环的检测与强制停止能力。这些改进从流程控制与异常处理两端着力，显著提升了AI编程助手在连续交互中的鲁棒性，为构建可依赖的Agent系统提供了更好的工程基座。
